shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Today
detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 93, with temperatures falling to around 83 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
